hooks.prompt: Dashboard security reminder: Verify for any dashboard route: (1) middleware.ts matcher includes the path, (2) API routes have path.startsWith() auth, (3) server components use getUser(). See security-posture skill.

PostgREST safety reminder: Apply these 9 gotchas to all Supabase/PostgREST calls: (1) No .update().or().select() — read-then-write. (2) .in() chunk under 50K rows. (3) Upsert needs ALL NOT NULL columns. (4) max_rows 50K hard cap. (5) No .maybeSingle() after .update(). (6) Bad .select() column = silent null. (7) ntile() on deduplicated set. (8) Never re-query fetched data. (9) Verify EVERY column name in .select() exists in actual schema. See database-query-safety skill.

hooks._bug_workaround: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/34573 — these hooks are loaded but never fired by Claude Code. Actual dispatch happens via bootstrap-hooks.sh injecting into settings.local.json at session start. Remove when fixed.

hooks.prompt: Git push safety reminder: Always check before any push: (1) no untracked files imported by committed code, (2) tests pass, (3) documentation.md updated if architectural files changed, (4) never force-push to master. Warn if any check would fail.
